name: Tap Oil Limited
summary: Tap Oil Limited engages in oil and gas exploration and production business in Asia and Australia. It operates through Oil & Gas Production and Development; and Oil & Gas Exploration segments. The company owns a 30% interest in the Manora oil field, which includes G1/48 concession located in the Gulf of Thailand. It also has interests in various exploration permits and retention leases in the Carnarvon and Bonaparte Basins, Western Australia. In addition, the company purchases and sells oil and gas. Tap Oil Limited was incorporated in 1995 and is based in Perth, Australia.
